scripts.test:ci: pnpm --filter @utility-cis/shared build && pnpm --filter @utility-cis/shared test && pnpm --filter @utility-cis/api test && pnpm --filter @utility-cis/web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @utility-cis/shared exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @utility-cis/api exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @utility-cis/web exec tsc --noEmit
